project_type: Next.js 16 web application with App Router, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: bun (package manager and runtime) with next build. node_modules need `bun install` first. Worker threads warnings from bun are non-fatal.
test_framework: No test framework installed - project has no test files
verification_instructions: 1. Run `bun run build` to verify compilation and type checking pass. 2. Run `bun run lint` to verify no lint errors.
environment_constraints: No npm available - use bun. Node.js not directly available in PATH but bun handles everything. OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full external access. AGENTS.md warns to check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for Next.js API changes but that directory does not exist in this version.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Use Semantic HTML for all layout sections.

key_patterns.api_layer: lib/itunes.ts contains all iTunes API calls. Functions return typed results. Uses fetch with next revalidate options.
key_patterns.types: lib/types.ts defines ItunesTrack interface and ItunesSearchResponse
key_patterns.pages: Server components by default. app/track/[id]/page.tsx fetches data server-side using async component pattern.
key_patterns.components: Client components in app/components/ use 'use client' directive. TrackCard links to /track/[id]. TrackGrid renders a responsive grid of TrackCards.
key_patterns.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 with custom CSS variables for theming (dark/light mode via prefers-color-scheme). Color tokens: background, foreground, muted, border, card, accent, accent-hover.
key_patterns.recommendations_current: Track detail page calls getArtistTracks() to show more songs from the same artist. This is the section to replace/augment with AI recommendations.
key_patterns.error_handling: Functions return { tracks, error: boolean } pattern for graceful degradation.

directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. lib/ - shared utilities and API functions. app/components/ - reusable React components. app/track/[id]/ - track detail page. app/favorites/ - favorites page.
